cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog and owner are in a completely new and quiet park. The dog is on a long leash, just sniffing and exploring the new environment. The owner is relaxed and not giving any commands. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A slow, wide panning shot that shows the new environment and the dog's freedom to explore and get comfortable.

cenas.dalle_prompt: After a few minutes of exploration, the owner calls the dog's name cheerfully. The dog looks back, and the owner gives a high-value treat. Re-establishing focus in the new place. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera is focused on the dog. When its name is called, it quickly turns its head, and the camera follows the movement to the owner for the reward.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The owner asks for a very simple, well-known command, like 'Senta'. The dog performs it successfully in the new park environment. The reward is extra enthusiastic. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A celebratory shot with a slight slow-motion and a 'Success!' text graphic appearing as the dog sits.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A montage of the dog performing simple commands in various new outdoor locations: a quiet town square, a different park, a pet-friendly store. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Quick cuts between the different locations, each with a text label (e.g., 'Praça', 'Loja Pet-Friendly'), showing the dog's adaptability.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog sitting on a scenic viewpoint, looking out at the world with its owner. Text overlay: 'O Mundo é a Sua Sala de Aula'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A beautiful, cinematic wide shot of the landscape. The text fades in with an inspiring and adventurous font.
